results.title: GoPro to 1/4"-20 Camera Mount Adapter - makerworld.com
results.snippet: This is a custom-designed adapter that allows you to mount a GoPro on a standard camera mount with a 1/4"-20 thread. The design is optimized for strength and durability, ensuring a secure fit for action cameras in various mounting scenarios.

results.title: Best STL files 3D printed for GoPro — 119 designs・Cults
results.snippet: Here is our selection of the best STL files for GoPro, all these accessories are from the 3D file library Cults and are perfectly 3D printable. This collection includes free 3D files of GoPro accessories.

results.title: gopro mount for camera stand 1 4 20 thread 3d models
results.snippet: Find 3716349 gopro mount for camera stand 1 4 20 thread 3D models for 3D printing, CNC and design. This takes @ModelStation's excellent PCB Vise and @hesperaux's more printable jaw shapes, and adds an industry-standard 1/4"-20 threaded mount.

results.title: ARKON 1/4"-20 Camera Mounting Thread to 3-Prong GoPro HERO Mount Adapter
results.snippet: The mount features a 3-prong action camera mount with a thumbscrew on top and a 1/4"-20 female thread on the bottom. It is designed to adapt your 2-prong camera mount onto a tripod or rig with a 1/4"-20 screw mount.

results.title: Amazon.com: Gopro Mount Adapter
results.snippet: Explore versatile GoPro mount adapters compatible with tripods, monopods, and selfie sticks. Find quality options for secure mounting.

results.title: GoPro Tripod Mount with Standard 1/4-20 UNC Screw Thread
results.snippet: A Gopro mount you can screw on any standard tripod. It is quite sturdy when printed with 20% infill and 0.1mm layers. results.title: Tripod Adapters | GoPro
results.snippet: Tripod Adapters These adapters let you attach your GoPro to any tripod, monopod or camera accessory with a standard 1/4-20 mount. results.snippet: This threaded mounting plate allows you to mount devices that use the 3-prong threaded adapter (like a GoPro, TomTom or other GPS devices). results.title: Camera Mounting Bolt to GoPro HERO Mount Connection Adapter
results.snippet: This versatile adapter transforms your standard camera mount or tripod into a GoPro-compatible accessory. Designed to work with mounts, tripods, and other accessories featuring a 1/4"-20 mounting bolt, it is compatible with GoPro HERO4, HERO3+, HERO3, HERO2, and HERO action cameras.
